name: Monkey's Paw
description: This model gains the following abilities:

granted_abilities.name: Cursed Wish
granted_abilities.text: Increase this model's Sp by 1. When this model declares the Walk action, it must discard a card or be dealt 1 irreducible damage.

granted_abilities.name: Demise (Wish Granted)
granted_abilities.text: After this model is killed, it infuses two (soulstone) instead of one and draws a card.
